session.user: Run prettier to check the two modified files and report results: prettier --check docs/learned/architecture/derived-flags.md docs/learned/architecture/plan-context-integration.md
session.assistant: I'll run prettier to check those two markdown files for you.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Check prettier formatting on two markdown files

session.tool_result: Checking formatting... All matched files use Prettier code style!
session.assistant:
**prettier passed:** Both files conform to Prettier code style
**Files checked:** - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/architecture/derived-flags.md` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/docs/learned/architecture/plan-context-integration.md`
Both modified files use correct Prettier formatting.
